name: Potatoes Gremolada
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Flat-leaf parsley, leaves; loosely pack
2 pounds Small red potatoes, unpeeled and quartered
1 Stick unsalted butter, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the lemon thinly using a sharp vegetable peeler, avoiding any bitter white pith.
2. Finely chop the lemon zest along with the parsley and garlic on a cutting board.
3. Place the potatoes in a medium saucepan and add enough water to cover them by 1 inch. Bring to a boil over high heat.
4. Reduce the heat to moderately high and cook the potatoes until tender, approximately 15 minutes.
5. Drain the potatoes in a colander and return them to the saucepan. Using a potato masher, mash the potatoes over very low heat.
6. Gradually incorporate the heavy cream and butter into the mashed potatoes. Stir in the salt and gremolata.
7. Serve immediately.
